audio.description: Audio sample of the voice to clone (WAV or MP3, 5-15 seconds). Longer clips are cut off at 15s.
audio.title: Audio

display_name.description: Name for the cloned voice (e.g. 'My Custom Voice').
display_name.title: Display Name

description.description: Optional description of the voice (e.g. 'Warm female narrator with British accent').
description.title: Description

remove_background_noise.description: Remove background noise from the audio sample before cloning.
remove_background_noise.title: Remove Background Noise

preview_text.description: Optional text to generate a preview with the cloned voice. If provided, returns a preview audio file.
preview_text.title: Preview Text
